trusted_baseline.commit_semantics: Verified GitHub merge commit for PR #10 and exact main head from which the lineage-reconciliation branch was created. Live GitHub state determines current main if it advances.

workstreams.objective: Correct stale repository-lineage inventory and align current boundary documentation without changing runtime, telemetry, diagnostics, baseline logic, deployment, or equipment behavior.
verification_criteria: the pull-request diff remains inside permitted_paths
the trusted baseline remains current main commit f991dfa72aa2967e54b8f69c18c2c91181c2e8cb unless live main advances
linealert-core remains the only authoritative LineAlert implementation repository
the root README and repository-lineage guidance agree that HelixMemoryService is design archaeology rather than current persistence authority
open linealert-analysis-engine PR #1 is recorded as non-current prototype work
no runtime, telemetry, diagnostic, baseline, workflow, deployment, credential, or equipment-control implementation is added

verification_evidence.current_head_ci: Resolve from live GitHub for the exact current branch head; this state intentionally does not cache a pass or pending value that becomes stale after a state-only commit.
verification_evidence.evidence_boundary: Live exact-current-head GitHub CI is authoritative for CI verification. Passing tests do not establish deployment or operational verification.

workstreams.next_gate: Confirm successful live exact-current-head CI, perform independent read-only review of that exact head and four-file scope, then require explicit human approval before merge.

authoritative.notes: Owns the deterministic machine-event reasoning core and current LineAlert implementation lineage.

active_related_boundaries.notes: Owns governed evidence-package and transport contracts; it is not merged into LineAlert Core.
Owns containment and policy enforcement; it is not the LineAlert implementation repository.

design_archaeology.disposition: Do not merge or copy wholesale into linealert-core. Reuse requires a new bounded branch, explicit source attribution, current authority boundaries, focused tests, and review.

Open PR #1 is non-current prototype work. Do not merge it into the current lineage or copy it wholesale. Preserve the repository only as historical evidence unless a bounded current increment deliberately re-derives selected behavior.

Preserve as design archaeology. It is not current LineAlert persistence, retrieval, or lifecycle-system authority. Any future persistence integration requires a separately governed current architecture and package boundary.

deployment_state.evidence: No current LineAlert Core deployment evidence is recorded in this repository state.

known_open_pull_requests.title: Reconcile LineAlert lineage boundaries
known_open_pull_requests.action: Keep draft. Resolve CI from live GitHub for the exact current head, complete independent read-only review, and obtain explicit human approval before merge.
